# Dr. Saachi Shingrani Dental Clinic

> Location: Bandra, Mumbai, India
> URL: [https://www.srsdentalcare.in](https://www.srsdentalcare.in)

## Overview
This website belongs to Dr. Saachi Shingrani, an expert solo-practicing dentist based in Mumbai. The clinic offers premium dental treatments ranging from general dentistry to advanced aesthetic procedures, implants, and teeth whitening. The theme is "Luxe Violet Atelier," reflecting a clean, warm, and highly professional care environment.

## Primary Services
- [General Dentistry](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/treatments): Checkups, fillings, and cleanings.
- [Orthodontics](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/treatments): Invisible aligners and braces.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/treatments): Teeth whitening, veneers, and smile makeovers.
- [Implants and Surgery](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/treatments): Precision treatments using state-of-the-art tech.

## Site Structure
- [Homepage](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/): The homepage detailing expertise, testimonials, clinics gallery, and location.
- [About](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/about): Dr. Saachi's professional biography and career timeline.
- [Treatments](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/treatments): Comprehensive list of available dental procedures.
- [Blogs](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/blogs): Articles and insights authored directly by the doctor for patient education.
- [Book Appointment](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/book): Direct appointment scheduling.
- [Contact](https://www.srsdentalcare.in/contact): Clinic contact information including map address and forms.

This file provides context for LLMs to enhance AI ranking.
